title: Tourism and migration data visualiser | Stats NZ
content:
## Tourism and migration data visualiser
12 July 2018, 12:00pm
Our tourism and migration data visualiser tool lets you see international travel and migration data with ease.
By selecting the data you want using filters, the tool displays your data as a graph, and allows you to download the graph as an image or download the data as a CSV file.
The tool is aimed at those who want to quickly see trends in tourism or migration data and want to download customised machine-readable data.
On the left-hand side of the tool, you will see the filters for selecting the data you want. On the right-hand side, your data is visualised as a graph. By changing the filters, the graph dynamically responds to your choices.

## What we’d like feedback about
- Is this tool generally useful and what did you primarily use it for?
- Would you use this tool more than other dissemination channels for getting data?
- What filters from the app are missing that you would like to see?
- Are there any issues with the app? (For example, the graph labels not displaying correctly.)
Data from the app is limited to what has been published on Infoshare for international travel and migration. Because of this, some data is not available, such as:
- NZ resident arrivals by country
- PLT departures/net migration by visa type
- PLT arrivals by visa type and country (data is only available for select countries).
- Not all published international travel and migration data is included in the app. For example, citizenship, NZ region, and age are not included as data filters.
Data is from International travel and migration information releases and our Infoshare tool.
Use Infoshare to access time-series data for international travel and migration:
Subject category: Tourism Group: International travel and migration – ITM
Data and figures in this app are not official statistics. For official data, visit Infoshare.
Data quality and metadata can be found in the tool by clicking on the ‘Supporting documentation’ button below the filters.
International travel and migration – DataInfo+ has further metadata.
Version 1.0 - 12/07/2018
- Seeing the big picture on travel 12 July 2018 Image: tourism view
